name: parseable
desc: Parseable is an open source, unified infrastructure observability platform built in Rust on a data lake architecture. It tracks logs, metrics, traces, and even…
descFull: Parseable is an open source, unified infrastructure observability platform built in Rust on a data lake architecture. It tracks logs, metrics, traces, and events across apps, agents, and systems, reducing storage costs by up to 90% through columnar telemetry compression.
